Game: From TV animation - Slam Dunk- Dream Team Shueisha Limited 1994-07-20T00:00:00-07:00 A special edition of From TV Animation Slam Dunk: Yonkyo Taiketsu! offering "all-star" teams, although there is no longer a "story" mode. <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/ae678205-0ed2-461b-b8d2-9dff873474e6.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/f0691d85-bb22-4d84-b23b-471a4bc0e593.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/43e89e13-1305-417f-8937-a5f6daa756cd.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/174afa7a-9101-4ea5-8c4e-7e6526070f19.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/8e88e763-dae9-4dd9-93ca-1f0f7f2194ac.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/4e5d0faa-3163-4cae-847c-563b8e9b57e5.png Sports TOSE Bandai
